description.unified: Restores HP equal to 10% of Max HP to the 4 allies with the lowest HP, and additionally restores HP every 0.5 sec for [8 sec->5 sec]. This effect cannot be dispelled.
Removes harmful effects from all allies and increases their Magic Defense by [???->50(1+0.3Skill Level)] for [20 sec->6 sec].
Deals Magic Damage to enemies within range 10 time(s), and reduces their Attack Speed by 25% for [(added) 10 sec].
Every 7 sec, restores [1 orb of mana->1000 Mana] and HP to [1 ally->1 ally] with the lowest HP.

IV.unified: Increases CC Resist by [250->300] for [20 sec->6 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], and the effect now applies to all allies.

dark.unified: Magic Defense is additionally increased by [10% of own M.DEF.->13%].

light.unified: Magic Damage taken by the target is increased by [(added) 25%], [(removed) Each hit removes 250 mana from the target].

dark.unified: Physical Damage taken by the target is increased by [(added) 25%], [(removed) In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, Silence enemies in range for 1 sec].

light.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [(added) 2 sec], [(removed) Uses the skill every 5 sec].

dark.unified: Additionally restores [???->500] Mana to the [ally->2 allies] with the highest Attack.

description.unified: [Soulrush] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and heals all allies' HP by {0}% of DMG.

Every 20 sec, puts the [lowest HP->2 allies with the lowest HP] into Spirit Form for {0} sec. Allies in Spirit Form are immune to physical attacks, their HP cannot be reduced below 1%, and their Mana recovery per second is increased [to {1}%->by 50%].
